descriptionTemplate: Lily gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: At turn start, gain 10% Max HP:{Endure}. When Lily applies a Shield, inflict [{Poison}:Arg2] {plural:[{Poison}:Arg2]|stack|stacks} of {Poison} on the enemy with the highest HP.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Lily gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: At turn start, gain {Endure} equal to 10% of Max HP. When Lily applies a Shield, inflict [{Poison}:Arg2] stacks of {Poison} on the enemy with the highest HP. Exalt makes each hit received this turn increases the {Endure} consumption effect of the next {Strike to Protect} by 40%, stacking up to 5 times.
